title: Classification of wreckers; license exemptions
doc_html:
§180.2.  Classification of wreckers; license exemptions

Wreckers shall be classified as emergency carriers and shall be exempted from the provisions of R.S. 45:178 and R.S. 45:179.

Added by Acts 1974, No. 462, §1.
